title: First Light
briefing: Viper Squadron, clear Ashford Shrike patrol over Port Kestrel. Destroy 2 enemy fighters and 3 SAM sites. AWACS Meridian Eye is on station.

radio.speaker: Meridian Eye
radio.line: Viper-1, hostile contacts bearing 270 over the harbor.

radio.speaker: Solano
radio.line: Stay on the bandits — SAMs will light up if you drop low.
